title: Seeing a Wheel or Spoke in a Dream: Meaning and Interpretation
seoDescription: Seeing a wheel in a dream symbolizes the cycles of life, change, movement, and karma.
introduction: The constantly spinning Wheel is a symbol of 'universal movement' and 'life cycles' in dreams. Just like in the metaphor of the Wheel of Fortune, it reminds us of the ups and downs of life, the inevitability of change, and the law of 'you reap what you sow' (karma).
symbolism: The wheel represents progress and journey. A smoothly rotating wheel indicates that things are going well and in harmony; a broken or flat wheel shows that your progress has stopped and you are facing an obstacle. Being inside the wheel symbolizes that you are stuck in a vicious cycle; turning the wheel signifies that you are taking your destiny into your own hands and playing an active role.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** This phase symbolizes new beginnings and potential. The wheel is calling you to step into a new cycle in your life; it may indicate that you are ready to leave behind your past karmas and make a fresh start.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** The Waxing Moon represents a period of progress and growth. The continuous rotation of the wheel indicates that your efforts and actions during this period are beginning to bear fruit, and you feel stronger and more determined on your life journey.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon is a moment of completion and enlightenment. At this stage, the wheel symbolizes that the cycles in your life have been completed and inner wisdom has come to light; this is an opportunity to see the results of your choices and make sense of the cycles in your life.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** The Waning Moon symbolizes a period of letting go and transformation. The wheel emphasizes that past obstacles and limiting patterns need to be left behind; this is the time to take courageous steps to shape your own destiny.
commonScenarios: Changing a wheel: Symbolizes changing tactics, transitioning to a new method, or correcting the course of your life.
Seeing a giant wheel: Represents the bigger picture of life, the workings of fate, and significant changes beyond your control.
Getting stuck under the wheel: Indicates being crushed under the speed of events or suffering due to resisting change.
cta: Where is the wheel turning for you? Download the Dream Boat app and break the cycle.
